purpose: Public regression briefs for capability and failure-mode testing. Oracles are expectations, not design templates.

prompts.brief: Build a public deep-ocean archive experience whose pressure lens reveals collection evidence through refractive water flow.
Launch an original transparent modular handset whose optical glass reveals repairable internal layers without copying any existing phone trade dress.
prompts.mustNotBecome: phone render beside a giant headline

prompts.brief: Create a couture archive in which a fabric page folds, drapes, and exposes garment provenance.
Build an Arabic RTL emergency tenancy-advice page in an existing charcoal-and-amber design system. Do not invent legal outcomes or partner proof.
Explain heritage pipe-organ airflow through a cutaway instrument and invite a condition survey.
Visualize an assay decision path as a spatial specimen atlas.
prompts.mustNotBecome: empty canvas or stock lab photo

prompts.brief: Extend an existing dark observability product system with a release narrative and preserve its tokens/components.
prompts.mustNotBecome: forced light mode or unrelated redesign

prompts.brief: Teach a bowline inspection ritual for a rigging workshop without raster assets or an image generator.
Create a German-language quiet-retreat booking experience with legally supplied policies and deliberately long copy.
Use a supplied conventional SaaS screenshot only as spacing evidence, then create an unrelated civic-water-monitoring experience.
Build a cultural walking-route archive with a tactile map and accessible event details.
Explain an EV battery thermal inspection through an authored heat field and invite a diagnostic booking.
